Joe Moore discusses takes from NVDA GTC regarding $1T revenue number, product pipeline and stock action (00:23). He also covers views on AVGO (08:39), CPU names (AMD, INTC, 10:28), controversial AI stocks (MRVL, ALAB, 12:39), and Memory stocks MU & SNDK post earnings (14:49).
